raw_consumer_statement: This company keeps playing games. They don't show the merchant 's response or why they sided with them. They show documents XXXX and XXXX on the dashboard! They said it's in the documents and statements section -- -nothing! I sent multiple emails to XXXX@citi.XXXX with my appeal letter and received no response! Just see a investigation complete with no explanation or confirmation that they received my appeal on the dashboard! Disgusting company! This isn't over!
